//: AEMaaCS purge scheduler config — replaces the JMX purgeCompleted() op.
SCHEDULING: this PID does NOT take a cron expression. Purge runs are
triggered by the Granite Maintenance Task framework. Configure the daily
Every PurgeScheduler config instance becomes a Maintenance Task that runs
in that window. Verified against PurgeScheduler.java — only the properties
below are read; any extra properties are silently ignored.
Descriptive name shown in the Maintenance Task console.
scheduledpurge.name: Daily purge of completed workflow instances
//: Which workflow states to purge. This field is an ARRAY of string options.
Valid: RUNNING, COMPLETED, SUSPENDED, ABORTED, FAILED.
Age threshold in days. Instances older than this (matching workflowStatus) are purged.
Optional: limit to specific workflow models. Empty array = all models.
If true, also purges any package payload referenced by the instance.
Leave false unless you are sure no other content references these packages.
